message:
fix(packs/cloud): close safe-pattern bypass on account/config/auth/info in resource names

Cloud pack safe subcommands (`az account`, `az configure`, `az login`,
`az version`, `gcloud config`, `gcloud auth`, `gcloud info`) used trailing
`\b`, letting a resource/subcommand name containing the keyword
short-circuit destructive cloud ops:

  az vm delete --ids account-old-vm-id      -> matched az-account safe
  gcloud compute instances delete config-server-v1
                                            -> matched gcloud-config safe

Changed trailing `\b` to `(?=\s|$)` across the remaining 7 cloud safe
subcommands.
